<!--
  PR Title format: ♻️ refactor(<scope>): <short description>
  Example: ♻️ refactor(terraform): extract naming logic into reusable module
  No new features or bug fixes — pure structural improvement.
-->

## Risk Assessment

- Risk level: <!-- Low / Medium / High -->

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests pass unchanged
- [ ] Tests updated to reflect structural changes
- [ ] No functional behaviour changed

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title: `♻️ refactor(<scope>): <description>`
- [ ] Labels applied: `maintenance`
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
- [ ] No unintended functional changes
